subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who is the Purpose of the world and the Object of worship of all nations, Who through His Most Exalted Word created earth and heaven... I beseech Thee by Him through Whom the valley flowed and through Whom the Light shone forth from the horizon of Hijaz [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصود عالم و معبود امم را لایق و سزاست که بکلمه علیا ارض و سما را خلق... اسألک بالّذی به سالت البطحآء و به اشرق النّور من افق الحجاز
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @creation of the world, @praise and encouragement
